title: ⇆雲端同步
encryptionAlreadyConfigured: 🔐 同步資料已加密。密碼留空即為沿用現有加密金鑰，或重新輸入以重新驗證此裝置。
passphrasePlaceholderExisting: (密碼留空即為沿用現有加密金鑰)
connectionFailed: 連線失敗: 請檢查您的帳號密碼與伺服器網址。
enterPassphraseToActivate: 輸入您的加密金鑰以啟用資料加密。
passphraseModalTitle: 🔑 輸入雲端同步的加密金鑰
passphraseModalNote: 🔐 同步資料已加密。請輸入加密金鑰以繼續同步。
incorrectPassphrase: 加密金鑰不匹配。請重新輸入。
cloudSyncRequired: 請先設定「⇆雲端同步」，「☁️雲端備份」將上傳至同一伺服器。
backupNote: 使用多台裝置時，請透過「⇆雲端同步」保持資料一致。「☁️雲端備份」僅限單台主裝置啟用。
noBackupsYet: 尚無備份 — 晴空萬里，未見一片雲
wrongPassphrase: 加密金鑰不匹配。請確認與其他裝置一致。
vaultSkippedToast: 有{{count}}個項目無法讀取。請檢查雲端同步設定。
vaultSkippedNote: 本裝置上有{{count}}個項目無法讀取並已略過。下次同步時將自動重試，這通常表示加密金鑰不一致。
verifierUnsupported: 請更新您的同步伺服器以支援金鑰驗證。
authFailed: 驗證失敗: 請檢查同步設定中的用戶名與密碼
forbidden: 同步遭拒(403): 您的伺服器拒絕了此請求
locked: 其他裝置正在同步，請稍後再試
networkError: 網路不穩: 請檢查連線後再試
preconditionFailed: 其他裝置剛更新了資料，正在重新同步
passphraseRequired: 請輸入加密金鑰以繼續同步
appIdMismatch: 此同步資料屬於其他應用程式
schemaForwardIncompatible: 請更新APP再試: 此同步資料來自較新的版本
webdavEnableNote: Sync to any WebDAV server (Nextcloud, ownCloud, etc.). Turn this off to keep your connection details but stop syncing on this device — for example when moving fully to GLANCEvault.
vaultExperimentalNote: Experimental. Requires a self-hosted GLANCEvault server. Not recommended for most users.
vaultCoexistNote: Row-grained database sync. Runs alongside WebDAV — both tiers can be enabled at once.
vaultPassphraseNote: The same passphrase your other devices use — not a separate vault secret.
vaultUninitialized: Connected, but this account has not been initialized yet — it will be set up on first sync.
vaultForbidden: Account ID not found or not permitted for this token.
vaultNetwork: Could not reach the vault at this URL. On a self-hosted server this is usually the vault not sending CORS headers for this app's address, a wrong or unreachable URL, or an untrusted TLS certificate.
vaultUnsupported: This vault server is too old — it doesn't support credential verification.
vaultPassphraseRequired: Enter your sync passphrase to enable database sync.
backfillNote: Upload photos and audio/video already on this device to GLANCEvault so they appear on your other devices. New attachments upload automatically; this is a one-time catch-up for older items. Safe to run repeatedly — already-uploaded items are skipped.
backfillNothing: Nothing to upload — all media on this device is already on GLANCEvault.
backfillKeyUnavailable: Vault key isn't ready yet. Let sync finish once, then try again.
backfillDoneWithFailures: Uploaded {{migrated}} item(s); {{failed}} could not be uploaded and stay on this device (you can try again later).
backfillStopped: Stopped after {{migrated}} item(s). Run again to finish the rest.
